changes.value: Add test_real_lsp_document_symbols to integration_test.rs that spawns real rust-analyzer, sends initialize/didOpen/documentSymbol, verifies symbols, persists to DB, checks lsp_indexed=1."
Real LSP integration test: rust-analyzer documentSymbol end-to-end
